---
title: "Clinical Variant Explorer Report"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
params:
  filtered_df: NULL
  filter_params: NULL
  plots: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || (length(a) == 1 && is.na(a))) b else a
df <- params$filtered_df
fp <- params$filter_params
```

## Run summary

- **Generated:** `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")`
- **Variants in filtered set:** `r nrow(df)`

## Active filters

```{r}
filter_summary <- data.frame(
  Filter = c("Chromosome", "QUAL range", "PASS only", "MAF range",
             "Gene(s)", "Consequence(s)", "Impact(s)"),
  Value = c(
    paste(fp$chr %||% "All", collapse = ", "),
    paste(fp$qual_range, collapse = " - "),
    as.character(fp$pass_only),
    paste(fp$maf_range, collapse = " - "),
    paste(fp$genes %||% "(any)", collapse = ", "),
    paste(fp$consequences %||% "(any)", collapse = ", "),
    paste(fp$impacts %||% "(any)", collapse = ", ")
  )
)
kable(filter_summary)
```

## Top 50 variants by QUAL

```{r}
df %>%
  arrange(desc(QUAL)) %>%
  head(50) %>%
  select(any_of(c("CHROM","POS","REF","ALT","QUAL","Gene_Name","Effect","Impact"))) %>%
  kable()
```

## Impact distribution

```{r}
if ("Impact" %in% names(df)) {
  df %>% count(Impact) %>% kable()
}
```
